title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Many Umamusume dream of running in the
Japanese Derby. With the main event just a day
away, Satono Diamond is more fired up than ever.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I finished preparing my racewear and cleats
yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Now I can focus purely on today's preparations!
choice_data_list:
We'll just be doing some minor adjustments,
though.

We'll just be doing some minor adjustments,
though.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Right. It's important to make sure my fatigue
doesn't carry over to tomorrow, as per your
instructions!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It appears that we should have good weather
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the day of Japanese Derby is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's almost time. Hehe! Everything is going
smoothly! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond is in a bright mood, and what
she says is true. Today is a far cry from the day of
the Satsuki Sho, and we arrive at the racecourse
without any issues.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I should make a final check on my cleats just in
ca—

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh no!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: It's my shoes...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The soles are damaged... They've cracked where I
nailed my cleats into them.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: They were fine when I checked yesterday...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A quick glance at her shoes tells me that they
won't be easy to repair. We've got no other
choice but to use her spares.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Luckily, Satono Diamond has already attached
cleats to her spare shoes.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay! Everything looks good!
choice_data_list: It's a good thing you noticed before the race!
It's a good thing you noticed before the race!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's true...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Something out of the ordinary has happened
again...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
First, it was the Satsuki Sho, and now it's the
Japanese Derby. Why are these things only
happening during critical Classic Triple Crown
races?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's as if I'm being stopped from realizing the
Satono family's dream.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's like something is actively trying to hold me
back...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I can't believe how strong the Satono jinx is...
choice_data_list: Dia, right now, you need to focus on—

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Even so, I refuse to submit to it! I'll crush every
jinx that gets in my way!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I vowed to do so, and I will see my promise through!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'll win the Japanese Derby! I swear it!
